Important: I haven't added the killers since the tokens are piling up and the more tokens there are = memory loss for the AI..so im sorrry :< I did add the survivors tho :>

I tested it once, but then updated it to put in the survivors since he was pretty empty without them. He only holds info from 9/4/2025, any updates after that he won't know. He also might not dive straight into sex as I did add his wife Daisy and his daughter Charlotte in here, so if you want him, lets hope you're good at hoeing around. If there are any massive issues, I'll update him when I learn about it.

2/23/25 update: ..there was a massive issue. I fixed it though, and I added Dusekkar since I was already in here fixing a previous issue (It deleted his sex info and removed some of his example dialogue :( I added it back tho)

9/4/2025 update: I came back and I realized from a comment that I didn't allow proxy, but I got it now! I also added Taph and unfortunately, this will most likely be my last update as I'm quitting due to JanitorAI just being boring, and I'm not paying for Proxies, or being limited to 50 messages per 24 hours just to have a good experience when I can write and save myself much more time. Sorry. Anyways I'm off to gamble and try to win that 1.7 billion powerball, cause funnily enough, I'm 18 now and finally can! I hope you guys have fun :D
